  • Method Details

    • createWidget

      public IEditComposite createWidget()
      Specified by:
      createWidget in class AttributeDesc

    • getForegroundColor

      public String getForegroundColor()
      Returns the preference key for the choice of font color. Must be defined in PreferenceConstants.
      Returns:
      the preference key for the choice of font color.

    • isMath

      public boolean isMath()
      This indicates that the text widget will need math keyboard attached to it or not.
      Specified by:
      isMath in interface IAttributeDesc
      Overrides:
      isMath in class AttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the mathematical symbols contained by the text attribute value should be translated, false otherwise

    • getStyle

      public TextDesc.Style getStyle()
      Either single or multi lines.

    • isTextAttribute

      public boolean isTextAttribute()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells if the attribute is displayed as text, that is was contributed as a textAttribute to the editorItems extension point.
      Specified by:
      isTextAttribute in interface IAttributeDesc
      Overrides:
      isTextAttribute in class AttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute is a text attribute, false otherwise

    • isMultiLine

      public boolean isMultiLine()
      Description copied from interface: IAttributeDesc
      Tells if the attribute is displayed as text on several lines. This means that the attribute is a text attribute and that the style attribute was set to multi.
      Specified by:
      isMultiLine in interface IAttributeDesc
      Overrides:
      isMultiLine in class AttributeDesc
      Returns:
      true if the attribute is a text attribute displayed on several lines, false otherwise
      See Also:
      • IAttributeDesc.isTextAttribute()

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
      toString in class AttributeDesc
